allow: Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const root=l.packages['']; console.log\('root devDependencies:', JSON.stringify\(root.devDependencies||{}\)\); console.log\('linux rollup in lock?', !!l.packages['node_modules/@rollup/rollup-linux-x64-gnu']\); console.log\('linux esbuild in lock?', !!l.packages['node_modules/@esbuild/linux-x64']\);")
